# komodo_stack_unpause (Action)

Triggers a `docker compose unpause` on the target Komodo stack.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `stack` (String) Id or name of the stack to unpause.

### Optional

- `services` (List of String) Filter to only unpause specific services. If empty, unpauses all services.
